properties.name: grails.mongodb.url
properties.description: The MongoDB connection URL. Supports the full MongoDB connection string format.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.host
properties.description: The MongoDB server hostname. Ignored when `url` or `connectionString` is set.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.port
properties.description: The MongoDB server port. Ignored when `url` or `connectionString` is set.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.databaseName
properties.description: The MongoDB database name.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.username
properties.description: The username for MongoDB authentication.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.password
properties.description: The password for MongoDB authentication.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.stateless
properties.description: Whether to use stateless mode with no session-level caching of entities.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.decimalType
properties.description: Whether to use Decimal128 for BigDecimal values instead of Double.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.codecs
properties.description: List of custom MongoDB Codec classes to register for BSON serialization.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.default.mapping
properties.description: A closure applied as the default GORM mapping block for all MongoDB domain classes.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.connectionPoolSettings.maxSize
properties.description: Maximum number of connections in the connection pool.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.connectionPoolSettings.minSize
properties.description: Minimum number of connections in the connection pool.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.connectionPoolSettings.maxWaitTime
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a connection from the pool.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.connectionPoolSettings.maxConnectionLifeTime
properties.description: Maximum lifetime in milliseconds of a pooled connection (0 for unlimited).

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.connectionPoolSettings.maxConnectionIdleTime
properties.description: Maximum idle time in milliseconds before a pooled connection is closed (0 for unlimited).

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.readPreference
properties.description: The MongoDB read preference (e.g., primary, secondary, nearest).

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.writeConcern
properties.description: The MongoDB write concern (e.g., majority, w1, journaled).

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.readConcern
properties.description: The MongoDB read concern level (e.g., local, majority, linearizable).

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.retryWrites
properties.description: Whether to retry write operations on transient network errors.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.retryReads
properties.description: Whether to retry read operations on transient network errors.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.applicationName
properties.description: Application name sent to MongoDB for server logs and profiling.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.sslSettings.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable TLS/SSL for connections to MongoDB.

properties.name: grails.mongodb.options.sslSettings.invalidHostNameAllowed
properties.description: Whether to allow connections to MongoDB servers with invalid hostnames in TLS certificates.
